languages.text: "Нет... не так... это фальшивка! Все было не так!"
"No... This isn't right... It's all lies! It wasn't like that!"
languages.original_text: "Нет... не так... это фальшивка! Все было не так!"

traits.locale_text: "No... This isn't right... It's all lies! It wasn't like that!"
"No... This isn't right... It's all lies! It wasn't like that!"
"No... This isn't right... It's all lies! It wasn't like that!"

languages.text: «No... Eso no está bien... ¡Es todo mentira! ¡Yo no era así!».
languages.original_text: "No... This isn't right... It's all lies! It wasn't like that!"

traits.locale_text: «No... Eso no está bien... ¡Es todo mentira! ¡Yo no era así!».

languages.text: “不……不对……这都是骗人的！事情根本不是那样的！”
languages.original_text: "No... This isn't right... It's all lies! It wasn't like that!"

traits.locale_text: “不……不对……这都是骗人的！事情根本不是那样的！”

languages.text: « Non... Ce n'est pas normal... Ce ne sont que des mensonges ! Ça ne s'est pas passé comme ça ! »
languages.original_text: "No... This isn't right... It's all lies! It wasn't like that!"

traits.locale_text: « Non... Ce n'est pas normal... Ce ne sont que des mensonges ! Ça ne s'est pas passé comme ça ! »

languages.text: "Hayır... Doğru olamaz... Hepsi yalan! Böyle olmadı!"
languages.original_text: "No... This isn't right... It's all lies! It wasn't like that!"

traits.locale_text: "Hayır... Doğru olamaz... Hepsi yalan! Böyle olmadı!"

languages.text: "Nein ... Das ist nicht richtig ... Das sind alles Lügen! So war es nicht!"
languages.original_text: "No... This isn't right... It's all lies! It wasn't like that!"

traits.locale_text: "Nein ... Das ist nicht richtig ... Das sind alles Lügen! So war es nicht!"

languages.text: 「違う…これは間違ってる…全部嘘だ！そうじゃなかった！」
languages.original_text: "No... This isn't right... It's all lies! It wasn't like that!"

traits.locale_text: 「違う…これは間違ってる…全部嘘だ！そうじゃなかった！」
